rulings.Case Title: RIVA RITSNER VS. OLYMPIC REHABILITATION DBA "YOUR HEALTH" ADULT DAY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 10, 2009, line 3, DEFENDANT SVETLANA STUKOV, and, OLYMPIC REHABILITATION MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Motion for summary adjudication of the Elder Neglect second cause of action, is granted. Defendant's actions do not rise to the level of elder neglect defined in Welfare & Institutions Code section 15610.57, or activity protected against as envisioned in the Elder Abuse and Dependent Adult Civil Protection Act. Heightened remedies of Welfare & Institutions Code section 15657 not available. Plaintiffs fail to raise a triable issue of material fact. No clear and convincing evidence of reckless, oppressive, fraudulent, or malicious conduct. (See Delaney vs. Baker (1999) 20 Cal.4th 23, Covenant Care, Inc. vs. Superior Court (2004) 32 Cal.4th 771 and Mack vs. Soung (2000) 80 Cal.App.4th 966).=(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MOHSAN KIRIMI VS. SHAHNAWAZ MANJI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Mohsan Karimi'S Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 10, 2009, line 6, Plaintiff Mohsan Karimi's Order to Show Cause regarding preliminary injunction (per ex parte Order of 7-24-09). Application for preliminary injunction is denied. Based only upon plaintiff's evidence (no evidence was submitted by defendant) plaintiff's likely to prevail on merits. However, this action is a breach of contract case. Plaintiff fails to show irreparable harm. Losses are compensable by a damage award. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 10, 2009, line 8, DEFENDANT LA TANYA SMITH DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer is overruled, five days leave to answer. Court does not take judicial notice of the checks. Factual issue not appropriate for demurrer. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION , AS VS. EDUARDO WHITE et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, August 10, 2009, line 9, DEFENDANT DELIA WHITE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer is sustained with five days leave to amend. Demurrer is permissible. (Code of Civil Procedure section 1170.) Notice is proper and in compliance with San Francisco Administrative Code section 37.9(a)(5). However, Body of complaint is uncertain: paragraph 6.b. refers to an oral agreement while paragraph 6.f references a written agreement. =(302/CWW)
